focus: Benchmark index and promotion flow alignment against packet 028 corrected benchmark and phase-040 evidence

evidenceSummary.summary: Skill-local benchmark README active table is stale: it lists only May 17/20 while a checked-in May 21 MPS benchmark report exists with a HOLD verdict.

Packet 028 corrected criterion-4 retrieval benchmark and phase-040 graduation verdicts are not promoted into the skill-local benchmark index, despite root/phase evidence recording corrected deltas and measured graduation results.
Current retrieval flag eval script matches the corrected-driver story: per-flag runs omit forceAllChannels, channel ablation keeps forceAllChannels by design, and trigger is excluded as un-ablatable.

Root benchmark-status has stale internal context: an earlier Track-C section says data-quality is proposed/not run/no code landed, while a later section records 005 data-quality built thirteen switches and phase 040 measured verdicts.
